title: E-commerce Black Friday limited-time campaign (IT)
rationale: Italian-language e-commerce campaign with explicit limited-time urgency. Tests IT locale + product offer type + visuals-required channel reasoning.
notes: Tests IT locale handling + correct channel routing for visual product (IG/TikTok), not LinkedIn.

input.raw_offer_text: Black Friday Boutique — fino al -40%. 5 giorni di sconti sulla nuova collezione. Marchio nato in Italia, prodotto in Toscana, spedizione gratuita oltre 100€.
input.target_customer: Donne 25-45 anni, mercato italiano, valore medio carrello 80-250€
proof_points: Black Friday 2024: +180% rispetto a un giorno medio

must_pass: [real-mode] channels.best_channels contains 'instagram' AND 'tiktok' (mock IT keyword detection limited, deferred to real model)
